title: Reduction of Multidimensional Wave Equations to Two-Dimensional   Equations: Investigation of Possible Reduced Equations
comment:
14 pages; submitted to the Proceedings of Workshop on Group Analysis
  of Differential Equations and Integrable Systems, Protaras, Cyprus, June 2010
summary:
We study possible Lie and non-classical reductions of multidimensional wave
equations and the special classes of possible reduced equations - their
symmetries and equivalence classes. Such investigation allows to find many new
conditional and hidden symmetries of the original equations.
